description:
The MazeGenerator component generates a maze (with a ton of slots) with given parameters.

}}

fields.Seed: The random seed for generating this maze.
fields.Cells: The maze square sections for this generated maze.
fields.WallSize: X: how long the walls are, Y: how tall the walls are.
fields.Point0: The start position for this maze.
fields.Point1: The end position for this maze.
fields.Material: The material for the walls of the maze.

methods.OnRandomizeSeed: Called when the randomize seed button is touched.
methods.OnGenerate: Called when the generate button is touched.

usage: Great for prototyping mazes, and can be baked.
